objective: Determine feasibility of adding KGSL device probe to Gallium pipe-loader for Rusticl on Termux

current_architecture.kgsl_driver_descriptor: DRM_DRIVER_DESCRIPTOR_ALIAS(msm, kgsl) — expects DRM fd, not raw KGSL fd

required_new_entrypoints: pipe_loader_kgsl_probe() — open /dev/kgsl-3d0, create fd_device, wrap as pipe_loader_device
pipe_loader_kgsl_create_screen() — call fd_screen_create() with kgsl fd_device

files_to_modify.change: Add pipe_loader_kgsl_probe to backends[] array (guarded by HAVE_FREEDRENO_KGSL)
Add pipe_loader_kgsl_probe() implementation or new file pipe_loader_kgsl.c
Add pipe_loader_kgsl.c to sources when freedreno-kgsl enabled

files_to_create.purpose: KGSL-specific device probe: open /dev/kgsl-3d0, call kgsl_device_new(), create pipe_screen

key_api_chain: Wrap pipe_screen in pipe_loader_device with driver_name="kgsl"

api_gaps.gap: fd_screen_create() expects fd_device from fd_device_new() which calls fd_device_open()
api_gaps.issue: fd_device_open() in freedreno_device.c tries drmGetVersion() on the fd — will fail on raw KGSL fd
api_gaps.fix: Bypass fd_device_open(), call kgsl_device_new() directly (already exists in kgsl/kgsl_device.c)

api_gaps.gap: pipe_loader_drm_device stores DRM fd and uses loader_get_driver_for_fd()
api_gaps.issue: KGSL fd is not a DRM fd, loader_get_driver_for_fd() will fail
api_gaps.fix: New pipe_loader_kgsl_device struct or hardcode driver_name="kgsl"
Need to trace exact call path: fd_drm_screen_create_renderonly → u_pipe_screen_lookup_or_create → fd_screen_create

alternative_approaches.feasibility: low — proot can't emulate kernel DRM ioctls
very_low — DRM ioctls incompatible with KGSL ioctls
medium — cleanest path, requires understanding fd_screen_create chain

conclusion.primary_challenge: Bridging kgsl_device_new() output into fd_screen_create() without DRM fd
conclusion.recommendation: Attempt Patch 39 prototype with minimal pipe_loader_kgsl.c
